items.ja: 'Shouldn't be in the game' - Rosenior wants stronger racism penalties

items.text_for_match: 'Shouldn't be in the game' - Rosenior wants stronger racism penalties Chelsea head coach Liam Rosenior believes anyone found guilty of racism should not work in football after Real Madrid's Vinicius Jr allegedly received racist abuse from Benfica's Gianluca Prestianni in the first leg of their Champions League play-off tie in Lisbon.
